title: Respawn Timer
description: Respawn the player after death only when the timer expires.
body:
## Respawn Timer 

⏳ **This datapack introduces a delayed respawn mechanic to your world.**  

- Upon death, the player enters spectator mode.  
- A timer counts down 60 seconds.  
- Once the timer reaches zero, the player can be respawned.  

⚙️ **Installation:**  
1. Download the datapack file.  
2. Place it in your world’s `datapacks` folder.  
3. Reload the world or use `/reload` to activate the datapack.
